basic_info.name: World Architecture 100 - the only comprehensive survey of the world's biggest architects
basic_info.description: World Architecture 100 brings you the latest news, data and analysis on the biggest architecture practices form around the world.

Every year Building Design surveys the world’s biggest architecture practices to create a report that is one of the most respected annual publications in the industry. Building Design subscribers will be able to read the results exclusively here on World Architecture 100 from 16 January. Simply login to your account to gain access. If you are not a subscriber, you may purchase a digital or print edition - please note the WA100 2026 edition is not available until 16 January. Purchase the 2026 edition  here WA100 2026 WA100 2026: The best get better 20 January 2026 By Thomas Lane Despite volatile times, architects are the most optimistic they’ve been about prospects for the year ahead since the post-covid bounce of 2022. Although optimism on growth dropped sharply back in 2023, this has steadily increased each year to almost match that of 2019. This is reflected in the number of ...
